name: CollateralXOracleAdapter

methods.name: readOraclePrice
methods.desc: Read the latest stored sample, including whether it is fresh right now.

methods.name: readFreshOraclePrice
methods.desc: Read the latest sample and reject if the adapter-level freshness window fails.

methods.name: updatePrice
methods.desc: Trusted-updater price update. Governance controls the updater account.

methods.name: adminSetPauseFlags
methods.desc: Admin-only replacement of oracle pause flags.

desc:
Oracle adapter for the v1 trusted-updater price feed.

Safety-critical assumption: v1 trusts a single updater account selected by
governance. The adapter enforces freshness, monotonic round updates, source
tagging, and pause-based circuit breakers. It does not verify an external
decentralized feed proof yet.
